Task.title: Task
Task.description: A daily planner planner task item

dueDate.description: Optional due date in YYYY-MM-DD format

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp or server timestamp when created

userId.description: The owner user ID matching request.auth.uid

userName.description: Name of the user assigning or carrying out the task

notes.description: Any additional notes or necessary important details

completedAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the task was completed

Schedule.title: Schedule
Schedule.description: An hourly tracker schedule document for a specific date

date.description: Date of the schedule in YYYY-MM-DD format

userId.description: The owner user ID matching request.auth.uid

slots.description: Map of hour strings to task values

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the schedule was updated

date.description: Date of the tracker in YYYY-MM-DD format

userId.description: The owner user ID matching request.auth.uid

count.description: Number of glasses of water drunk

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the tracker was updated

tasks/{taskId}.description: Collection of tasks stored per user

schedules/{date}.description: Collection of schedules for each date

hydrations/{date}.description: Collection of water hydration counts for each date
